title: Pharmacy First and alternative NHS services
content:
## Signposting before GP booking

Research agent may recommend alternatives:
- **Pharmacy First** — UTIs, impetigo, shingles, etc. where pathway eligible.
- **Walk-in centres** — minor injuries, same-day access.
- **NHS 111** — urgent advice when GP capacity insufficient.
- **Self-care** — minor ailments with safety-netting.

If Pharmacy First eligible, offer it before booking GP. If patient insists on GP, proceed with booking. Document the alternative offered in the rationale.
